prompt: Run a final Grain sync for any meetings from today that haven't been synced yet: node skills/crm/scripts/sync.js --days 1. Then give me an end-of-day recap: 1) List all meetings synced today with their summaries. 2) List all pending action items — both mine and others'. 3) List any overdue action items. 4) Highlight anything important that came up today. Keep it concise.
